reviews.review_msg: She is a boring person because of the way she speaks in lectures. But stats is a boring subject. I will take her other classes if offered, if there are no other options.

The professor only read ppt, but not explain the concept.
She not even speaks English fluently.

This is for stat 270 online, Professor Wang was reasonable and gave us fair exams. She also provided us extra chapter problems which were extremely helpful. Her lectures are quite boring but they are clear and her notes are organized.

Dr Wang is a nice and caring person. Lectures were pretty dry. Make sure you know how to derive formulae -- that was a huge focus in all the exams. The exams were pretty tight on time, with barely enough thinking time. The notes are very organized though, which is a big plus. The textbook is very helpful, as is the TA.

Exams resembled lecture content but barely reflected assignments. Assignments involved computational problems, while most exam questions were proofs. Ensure you can derive everything (not exaggerating). The exams are fair but are difficult to finish on time. The TA and the textbook were essential to my success in the course.

Dr. Wang is a nice person but lecture is kind of boring. She gave 5% bonus as long as you finish the participation quiz. She is very happy to help if you have questions. Midterms are closely related to samples. This course is hard in nature, and extremely focus on math. Final exam is very difficult, be prepared to study hard to get a good grade.

The course structure wasn't great. The first 10 weeks covered trivial concepts at an extremely slow pace and the last three weeks were crammed with way more complex concepts. There are minimal practice questions available. The final was terribly structured, only testing maybe 10% of what we learned in the semester.

For a stats course that is very heavy on the math, she ain't the worst prof to have. The textbook isn't really worth reading, just follow her provided lecture notes. Though I do have to say, the final was absurd in difficulty compared to everything else in the course..
Amazing professor. Cares about student's success.
Prof Wang is super caring and helpful. The class is relatively light and easy for someone with a statistics background. If you ever get stuck, she will always help you during her office hours.
